prompt: Create a professional logo mark for Stanley Systems, designed for blue-collar service-business owners (marine service, contractors, field service). Style: clean, trustworthy, industrial but modern, simple enough for a website favicon and footer badge. Avoid trendy startup gradients, mascots, and abstract AI aesthetics. Use a strong monogram or emblem that suggests systems, flow, reliability, structure, and operational order. Colors should fit Stanley Systems brand: deep green, charcoal, off-white, subtle steel accents. Flat vector-style look on transparent background. Must feel practical, established, and premium to owner-operators in trades. Square composition, centered, minimal, high-contrast, no background scene, no mockup, logo only.
